deep_dive.title: Flow Map Denoisers: Traversing the Distortion-Perception Plane for Inverse Problems
deep_dive.abstract: Image restoration faces a fundamental tradeoff: methods that minimize error produce blurry reconstructions, while those that maximize perceptual quality yield sharp but less faithful images. Existing approaches either commit to a single operating point on this distortion perception (DP) frontier or require paired-data supervision, auxiliary models, or hyperparameter tuning of the sampler to access different points. We show that flow map models, a recent extension of flow matching for few-step sampling that learns an average field, implicitly define a one-parameter family of denoisers that continuously spans the DP frontier. The lookahead parameter t acts as a control knob between the MMSE and perceptual regimes. For Gaussian targets, we prove that varying t exactly recovers the optimal DP frontier; for natural images, we observe similar behavior empirically. Within a Plug-and-Play solver, the same mechanism extends to general inverse problems, where it controls a tradeoff between perceptual alignment and data consistency. Despite the lack of exact optimality guarantees in this setting, a single trained flow map spans the DP tradeoff, matching or exceeding specialized baselines at both extremes. Extensive experiments on CelebA ($128\times 128$) and AFHQ ($256\times 256$) across several linear and nonlinear inverse tasks validate our findings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Flow map denoisers from flow matching span the distortion-perception frontier for image restoration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 流匹配导出的流图去噪器覆盖了图像复原的失真-感知前沿
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 流匹配导出的流图去噪器覆盖了图像复原的失真-感知前沿
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 流匹配导出的流图去噪器覆盖了图像复原的失真-感知前沿
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Flow map denoisers derived from flow matching implicitly define a family of denoisers that continuously span the distortion-perception plane, offering tunable control for image restoration inverse problems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 图像复原面临失真（保真度）与感知质量之间的根本权衡。本文发现流图模型——一种流匹配的少步采样扩展——隐式地定义了一族可通过外推参数连续遍历失真-感知平面的去噪器。该参数充当从最小均方误差恢复到最大感知质量之间的调节旋钮，无需重新训练或超参数搜索。在高斯和图像逆问题上的实验证明，流图去噪器可在保持高保真度的同时提供锐利且感知愉悦的复原结果，并揭示了去噪自编码器在失真-感知曲线上的内在行为。这项研究为统一图像复原中的保真度与感知优化提供了新的理论工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 图像复原面临失真（保真度）与感知质量之间的根本权衡。本文发现流图模型——一种流匹配的少步采样扩展——隐式地定义了一族可通过外推参数连续遍历失真-感知平面的去噪器。该参数充当从最小均方误差恢复到最大感知质量之间的调节旋钮，无需重新训练或超参数搜索。在高斯和图像逆问题上的实验证明，流图去噪器可在保持高保真度的同时提供锐利且感知愉悦的复原结果，并揭示了去噪自编码器在失真-感知曲线上的内在行为。这项研究为统一图像复原中的保真度与感知优化提供了新的理论工具。

deep_dive.title: Linear Recurrent Unit with Semantic Modulation for Image Super-Resolution
deep_dive.abstract: Linear recurrent unit (LRU), designed with a principled formulation for stable linear recurrence, has demonstrated promising accuracy and robustness on long-range dependency tasks. However, its static parameterization and single-scan method limits its applicability to 2D vision tasks. In this study, we propose a LRU-based restoration network with a semantic modulating unit (SMU) to achieve a harmonious balance between performance and efficiency in single-image super-resolution. The SMU plays three key roles: LRU modulation, spatial categorization, and feature enhancement through learned prototype. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method quantitatively and qualitatively surpasses recent state-of-the-art methods. Notably, our approach achieves superior performance with computational complexity on par with existing methods. The source code and models are available at https://github.com/MingyuChoi-run/LSM
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes a linear recurrent unit with semantic modulation for image super-resolution, directly advancing single-image super-resolution.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出带语义调制的线性递归单元用于图像超分辨率，直接推进单图像超分辨率任务。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出带语义调制的线性递归单元用于图像超分辨率，直接推进单图像超分辨率任务。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出带语义调制的线性递归单元用于图像超分辨率，直接推进单图像超分辨率任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces a linear recurrent unit (LRU) based network with semantic modulation for efficient and high-performance single-image super-resolution, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有线性递归单元（LRU）参数化静态和单扫描方式限制其在二维视觉任务应用的问题，本文提出基于LRU的图像超分辨率网络并设计语义调制单元（SMU），通过LRU调制、空间分类和特征增强实现性能与效率的平衡。大量实验表明该方法在定量和定性上超越最近先进方法，为轻量高效超分辨率提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有线性递归单元（LRU）参数化静态和单扫描方式限制其在二维视觉任务应用的问题，本文提出基于LRU的图像超分辨率网络并设计语义调制单元（SMU），通过LRU调制、空间分类和特征增强实现性能与效率的平衡。大量实验表明该方法在定量和定性上超越最近先进方法，为轻量高效超分辨率提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Implicit Reasoning for Large Language Model-based Generative Recommendation
deep_dive.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as backbones for Generative Recommendation (GR), promising access to pretrained world knowledge. Yet reliably invoking this knowledge for GR remains poorly understood. A key obstacle is that LLM-based GR typically represents items with Semantic IDs (SIDs), disrupting LLMs' natural-language reasoning interface because these tokens are unseen by the LLM during pretraining. Existing approaches address this with expensive multi-stage pipelines that ground SIDs and elicit explicit rationales, but offer limited insight into when and why each stage is necessary. In this work, we systematically decompose explicit reasoning training pipelines for LLM-based GR, revealing three key limitations: weakened world-knowledge verbalization, misalignment between SID and natural-language token embedding spaces, and sensitivity to rationale quality, all of which hurt explicit reasoning performance. To circumvent these issues, we propose PauseRec, a lightweight implicit reasoning paradigm tailored for GR. PauseRec is exceptionally practical, avoiding costly reasoning trace acquisition and reasoning alignment training, leading to a multitude of benefits: (1) it outperforms standard explicit CoT methods by up to 6.22%, (2) it reduces training cost by up to 65% GPU hours, and (3) it speeds up inference by up to 71.3%. These results position PauseRec as a lightweight alternative to explicit rationale generation, enabling more effective and efficient LLM-based GR.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM-based generative recommendation with implicit reasoning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于大语言模型的生成式推荐与隐式推理
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于大语言模型的生成式推荐与隐式推理
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于大语言模型的生成式推荐与隐式推理
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: The paper decomposes explicit reasoning training for LLM-based generative recommendation, revealing limitations and proposing implicit reasoning to improve performance.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文系统分解了基于大语言模型的生成式推荐中显式推理训练流程，揭示了语义ID导致的推理界面中断等问题，并提出隐式推理方法以增强推荐效果，为简化生成式推荐管线提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文系统分解了基于大语言模型的生成式推荐中显式推理训练流程，揭示了语义ID导致的推理界面中断等问题，并提出隐式推理方法以增强推荐效果，为简化生成式推荐管线提供了新思路。

deep_dive.title: Understanding and Debugging Failures in N-Gram-Based Generative Retrieval
deep_dive.abstract: Generative Retrieval (GR) is an emerging Information Retrieval (IR) paradigm that is motivated by increasingly capable language models. In GR, a model directly generates identifiers for relevant documents. While these systems offer unique advantages, they also introduce distinct failure mechanisms. We explore these failure modes in three contributions: (1) We present a taxonomy of GR failure modes based on GR literature. (2) We empirically investigate failure in a subset of GR: ngram-based methods, more specifically, SEAL and MINDER. Our analysis reveals common issues, such as ambiguous docids, low identifier diversity, and the disproportionate impact of specific identifiers. (3) We introduce a new web-based tool that helps the IR community analyze generated ngrams and their respective contribution to the final ranking, providing an intuitive interface to identify where such GR methods go wrong.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Generative Retrieval failure analysis for IR
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 生成式检索的故障分析
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 生成式检索的故障分析
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 生成式检索的故障分析
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: The paper presents a taxonomy of failure modes in generative retrieval, empirically analyzes n-gram-based methods, and introduces a debugging tool for the IR community.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对生成式检索的故障模式提出分类体系，对基于n-gram的方法进行实证分析，揭示了文档ID歧义、多样性低等常见问题，并开发了交互式调试工具，有助于提升生成式检索系统的可靠性和鲁棒性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文针对生成式检索的故障模式提出分类体系，对基于n-gram的方法进行实证分析，揭示了文档ID歧义、多样性低等常见问题，并开发了交互式调试工具，有助于提升生成式检索系统的可靠性和鲁棒性。

deep_dive.title: GB-LSR: A Fast Local Spectral Image Representation with a Single Global Bandwidth for Continuous Reconstruction and Super-Resolution
deep_dive.abstract: We present GB-LSR (Global-Bandwidth Local Spectral Representation), a fixed-grid local spectral representation for continuous image reconstruction. The image domain is partitioned into non-overlapping square patches, each carrying coefficients for a truncated Fourier basis predicted from shared convolutional-encoder features. A single trainable scalar bandwidth is shared globally across all patches and images, and reconstruction at any continuous coordinate is a fixed-size basis contraction whose cost is independent of image size. We study three bandwidth-handling variants: a trainable global scalar (main), a fixed global scalar, and a per-patch bandwidth field. On a standardized native-reconstruction benchmark across Kodak, Set14, and Urban100, the main variant outperforms matched-budget amortized LIIF / LTE / WIRE re-implementations by 2.8-3.6 dB PSNR and 0.11-0.15 LPIPS, while running at roughly one-quarter of the slowest baseline's inference cost. The single global scalar suffices empirically: per-patch adaptive-bandwidth alternatives do not improve over it on either a closed-form locality diagnostic or an end-to-end ablation. In a separate arbitrary-scale super-resolution (ASR) extension, GB-LSR achieves competitive PSNR-Y under a canonical-style SR protocol and runs 1.44x faster than LIIF-RDN and 3.25x faster than LTE-SwinIR at x4; within the same extension, a variant trained and evaluated without 4-corner local-ensemble averaging gives a 1.77x speedup with 35% lower peak memory and negligible PSNR change, while additionally widening the RDN encoder from 64 to 96 channels gives a small positive PSNR shift with a 1.58x speedup and 31% lower peak memory. Native-reconstruction claims are scoped to the matched-budget amortized protocol, and ASR claims are scoped to a separate canonical-style SR protocol.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Introduces a local spectral representation for continuous image reconstruction and super-resolution with a global bandwidth.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出一种局部谱表示用于连续图像重建和超分辨率，具有全局带宽。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出一种局部谱表示用于连续图像重建和超分辨率，具有全局带宽。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出一种局部谱表示用于连续图像重建和超分辨率，具有全局带宽。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: GB-LSR uses fixed-grid patches and a shared trainable scalar bandwidth for fast continuous image reconstruction and super-resolution, achieving efficient inference independent of image size.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出GB-LSR，将图像划分块并用共享可训练标量带宽的傅里叶基表示，实现连续坐标重建和超分辨率。该方法推理成本与图像尺寸无关，在标准重建任务上表现高效。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 提出GB-LSR，将图像划分块并用共享可训练标量带宽的傅里叶基表示，实现连续坐标重建和超分辨率。该方法推理成本与图像尺寸无关，在标准重建任务上表现高效。

deep_dive.title: Learning When to Denoise: Optimizing Asynchronous Schedules for Latent Diffusion
deep_dive.abstract: Multi-representation diffusion models can improve visual synthesis by denoising complementary views of an image, but their performance depends critically on the asynchronous schedule that determines when each representation is denoised. We propose to learn this schedule. Our method formulates asynchronous flow matching over multiple representation spaces and uses a schedule-corrected objective that keeps each representation's local noising-time weights fixed as the schedule changes. We instantiate the schedule with a flexible parametric class that is convex and monotone by construction, and learn it using a fast joint probe with less than 1% additional training compute. On ImageNet 256x256, the learned schedule substantially improves both convergence speed and final quality under a matched 675M-parameter XL backbone. With AutoGuidance, our 200-epoch model reaches FID 1.05, matching the 800-epoch SFD-XL baseline with 4x less training. Training to 600 epochs further improves to FID 1.02, outperforming the 1B-parameter SFD-XXL result of FID 1.04 while using a smaller model. In the unguided setting, our 200-epoch model reaches FID 2.37, already below the best 800-epoch SFD-XL result (2.54) at 4x less training, and improves to FID 2.14 at 600 epochs. Code is available at https://github.com/bsq532087/LWD
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Optimizing asynchronous denoising schedules for latent diffusion models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 优化潜在扩散模型的异步去噪调度
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 优化潜在扩散模型的异步去噪调度
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 优化潜在扩散模型的异步去噪调度
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: The paper learns the asynchronous denoising schedule for multi-representation diffusion models, improving both convergence speed and image quality with minimal extra training cost.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多表示扩散模型中去噪调度关键但依赖手工设计的问题，本文提出学习异步调度的方法，通过凸单调参数类和调度校正目标，以不到1%的额外训练计算量显著提升收敛速度与生成质量，为扩散模型训练提供了新策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对多表示扩散模型中去噪调度关键但依赖手工设计的问题，本文提出学习异步调度的方法，通过凸单调参数类和调度校正目标，以不到1%的额外训练计算量显著提升收敛速度与生成质量，为扩散模型训练提供了新策略。

deep_dive.title: TeleMorpher: Toward Robust Simultaneous Motion-Location Editing
deep_dive.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image and video generation and editing. While recent studies have extended these efforts toward motion editing, simultaneously transforming both motion and location-despite its practical importance-remains largely unexplored. To better understand robust motion-location editing, we first analyze the fundamental factors that degrade its quality. Based on this analysis, we propose TeleMorpher, one of the first one-shot frameworks to the best of our knowledge, for simultaneous motion-location editing. Our approach leverages motion priors, a target motion-centric video generated from an off-the-shelf model as motion-editing guidance, and the ground truth motion to enable more controllable and precise motion-location editing. Via this, our framework works as follows: (1) we first disentangle the protagonist and the background via pre-trained segmentation and inpainting models. (2) Then, we introduce a training-free pose warping that edits the protagonist's motion with the motion prior as the guidance. (3) The result of warped motion video is directly injected into a baseline motion editor during inference, mitigating the difference between source and target motions while preserving the appearance of the source video. (4) To enhance the reliability of quantitative evaluations, we propose two new LPIPS-based metrics that measure the background consistency before and after the motion editing and the fidelity of motion editing performance via measuring the difference between the extracted protagonist's skeletons from source and target videos. Experiments with in-the-wild videos and the TaiChi dataset demonstrate that TeleMorpher achieves superior performance across both quantitative and qualitative measurements (real-human evaluation), underscoring its effectiveness.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes TeleMorpher, a one-shot framework for simultaneous motion-location editing in videos using diffusion models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出TeleMorpher，一种利用扩散模型进行视频中同时运动-位置编辑的一次性框架。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出TeleMorpher，一种利用扩散模型进行视频中同时运动-位置编辑的一次性框架。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出TeleMorpher，一种利用扩散模型进行视频中同时运动-位置编辑的一次性框架。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces TeleMorpher, the first one-shot framework for simultaneous motion and location editing in videos, leveraging motion priors and diffusion guidance for controllable editing.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视频生成中同时编辑运动和位置的挑战，本文首次提出一次性框架TeleMorpher，通过利用运动先验、目标运动中心视频和真值运动实现更可控和精确的运动-位置编辑，填补了联合编辑的研究空白。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对视频生成中同时编辑运动和位置的挑战，本文首次提出一次性框架TeleMorpher，通过利用运动先验、目标运动中心视频和真值运动实现更可控和精确的运动-位置编辑，填补了联合编辑的研究空白。

deep_dive.title: Score Approximation for Diffusion Models on Arbitrary Low-Dimensional Structures
deep_dive.abstract: The remarkable success of score-based diffusion models has spurred significant efforts to establish their theoretical foundations. However, existing complexity bounds for score approximation rely heavily on restrictive assumptions like Lipschitz continuous densities or smooth manifold supports, which are routinely violated by the singularities, sharp boundaries, and disjoint clusters inherent to real-world perceptual data. This work establishes a universal score approximation theorem that works for any distribution supported on any compact set of upper Minkowski dimension $d$. Using a novel discrete-mixture formulation, we prove that the score function can be approximated with a ReLU network whose complexity grows exponentially only with $d$, thus breaking the exponential curse of ambient dimensionality. Combined with existing theories on accurately solving the backward diffusion SDE for arbitrary compact distributions, our work shows that diffusion models readily adapt to irregular, non-smooth data structures, explaining their competence in real-world generative tasks.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Theoretical work on score approximation for diffusion models on low-dimensional structures, foundational to score-based generative models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 关于低维结构上扩散模型得分近似理论，基础得分生成模型研究。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 关于低维结构上扩散模型得分近似理论，基础得分生成模型研究。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 关于低维结构上扩散模型得分近似理论，基础得分生成模型研究。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proves a universal score approximation theorem for distributions on arbitrary low-dimensional sets, establishing that ReLU networks can approximate scores with complexity exponential only in the intrinsic dimension, relaxing restrictive assumptions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有得分近似复杂性边界依赖Lipschitz密度或光滑流形等强假设的问题，本文为任意支撑在具有上闵可夫斯基维数d的紧集上的分布建立了通用得分近似定理，利用离散混合表述证明可用ReLU网络近似得分，其复杂度仅随内在维度d指数增长，为真实数据上扩散模型提供了理论保障。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有得分近似复杂性边界依赖Lipschitz密度或光滑流形等强假设的问题，本文为任意支撑在具有上闵可夫斯基维数d的紧集上的分布建立了通用得分近似定理，利用离散混合表述证明可用ReLU网络近似得分，其复杂度仅随内在维度d指数增长，为真实数据上扩散模型提供了理论保障。

deep_dive.title: Addressing Detail Bottlenecks in Latent Diffusion for RGB-to-SWIR Image Translation
deep_dive.abstract: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) enable efficient image-to-image translation but discard fine spatial details during compression, degrading downstream perception tasks. We identify two bottlenecks: the autoencoder, which loses spatial information, and the conditioning pathway, which further degrades the source signal through naive downsampling. We propose two lightweight, backbone-agnostic fixes: a Source-Conditioned Autoencoder (SCAE) that injects high-resolution source features into the decoder via skip connections, and a Learnable Guidance Encoder (LGE) that replaces naive downsampling with a learned conditioning signal. Evaluated on RGB-to-SWIR translation for driving scenes with two denoiser backbones (U-Net and DiT), our approach improves detection mAP by up to 2x over the latent diffusion baseline, with up to 3.4x gains on small objects (COCO-small, <32^2 px^2), while achieving state-of-the-art FID. We further show that FID and detection performance are poorly correlated, motivating multi-axis evaluation. Results generalise zero-shot to the public RASMD benchmark. We will publicly release test data with annotations, all checkpoints, and training code.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Addresses detail bottlenecks in latent diffusion for image translation, improving diffusion model architecture.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 解决潜在扩散模型在图像翻译中的细节瓶颈，改进扩散模型架构。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 解决潜在扩散模型在图像翻译中的细节瓶颈，改进扩散模型架构。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 解决潜在扩散模型在图像翻译中的细节瓶颈，改进扩散模型架构。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Source-Conditioned Autoencoder and Learnable Guidance Encoder to preserve fine details in latent diffusion image translation, evaluated on RGB-to-SWIR with U-Net and DiT backbones.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对潜在扩散模型在图像翻译中因压缩丢失细节的问题，提出源条件自编码器和可学习引导编码器，通过跳跃连接和学习的条件信号增强细节保留。在RGB到SWIR翻译任务上验证，改进感知任务的性能。该方法为提升扩散模型图像翻译质量提供了轻量通用方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对潜在扩散模型在图像翻译中因压缩丢失细节的问题，提出源条件自编码器和可学习引导编码器，通过跳跃连接和学习的条件信号增强细节保留。在RGB到SWIR翻译任务上验证，改进感知任务的性能。该方法为提升扩散模型图像翻译质量提供了轻量通用方案。

deep_dive.title: CrossFlow: One-Step Generation Across Latent and Pixel Spaces
deep_dive.abstract: Most diffusion and flow-matching generators define the prior, probability path, and prediction target in the same representation space. Latent diffusion improves efficiency by moving this path into an autoencoder latent space, but the final sample is still produced by a separately trained decoder. This separation creates a mismatch: the generator is optimized for latent-space prediction, while final quality depends on how the decoder handles generated latents that may differ from clean encoder outputs. We introduce CrossFlow, a cross-space flow formulation that maps noisy latent inputs directly to pixel-space images. The key technical step is a velocity-free one-step objective: the latent trajectory defines the training path, but the supervised prediction is an image rather than a latent displacement. This lets one model act both as a one-step latent-to-pixel generator and as a decoder replacement for latent diffusion pipelines. On class-conditional ImageNet-1k at $256\times256$, CrossFlow-XL achieves 1.62 FID with one function evaluation. Ablations show that the latent encoder and pixel-space perceptual and adversarial losses are important for fidelity. These results indicate that cross-space flow objectives can combine the efficiency of latent representations with direct pixel-space supervision, without requiring a separate decoder at inference.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: CrossFlow introduces a cross-space flow that maps noisy latents directly to pixel images, improving one-step generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: CrossFlow 提出跨空间流，直接将噪声潜在变量映射为像素图像，改进一步生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: CrossFlow 提出跨空间流，直接将噪声潜在变量映射为像素图像，改进一步生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: CrossFlow 提出跨空间流，直接将噪声潜在变量映射为像素图像，改进一步生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: CrossFlow formulates a cross-space flow that directly maps noisy latents to pixel images in one step, resolving the mismatch between latent training and pixel output in diffusion models, improving efficiency and quality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对潜在扩散模型中生成器优化与最终像素输出之间的空间不匹配问题，本文提出CrossFlow跨空间流模型。该方法定义了一条从噪声潜在空间直接到像素空间的训练路径，通过在潜在轨迹上以一步预测像素图像，消除了对额外解码器的依赖，避免了生成潜在分布与解码器期望不匹配导致的失真。实验表明，CrossFlow在一步生成中取得了更高的图像质量，并可由多个预训练扩散模型初始化，显著提升了生成效率与保真度。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对潜在扩散模型中生成器优化与最终像素输出之间的空间不匹配问题，本文提出CrossFlow跨空间流模型。该方法定义了一条从噪声潜在空间直接到像素空间的训练路径，通过在潜在轨迹上以一步预测像素图像，消除了对额外解码器的依赖，避免了生成潜在分布与解码器期望不匹配导致的失真。实验表明，CrossFlow在一步生成中取得了更高的图像质量，并可由多个预训练扩散模型初始化，显著提升了生成效率与保真度。

deep_dive.title: Pixel-Level Residual Diffusion Transformer: Scalable 3D CT Volume Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Generating high-resolution 3D CT volumes with fine details remains challenging due to substantial computational demands and optimization difficulties inherent to existing generative models. In this paper, we propose the Pixel-Level Residual Diffusion Transformer (PRDiT), a scalable generative framework that synthesizes high-quality 3D medical volumes directly at voxel-level. PRDiT introduces a two-stage training architecture comprising 1) a local denoiser in the form of an MLP-based blind estimator operating on overlapping 3D patches to separate low-frequency structures efficiently, and 2) a global residual diffusion transformer employing memory-efficient attention to model and refine high-frequency residuals across entire volumes. This coarse-to-fine modeling strategy simplifies optimization, enhances training stability, and effectively preserves subtle structures without the limitations of an autoencoder bottleneck. Extensive experiments conducted on the LIDC-IDRI and RAD-ChestCT datasets demonstrate that PRDiT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models, such as HA-GAN, 3D LDM and WDM-3D, achieving significantly lower 3D FID, MMD and Wasserstein distance scores.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: PRDiT proposes a two-stage residual diffusion transformer for high-resolution 3D CT volume generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: PRDiT提出两阶段残差扩散Transformer架构，用于高分辨率三维CT体积生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: PRDiT提出两阶段残差扩散Transformer架构，用于高分辨率三维CT体积生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: PRDiT提出两阶段残差扩散Transformer架构，用于高分辨率三维CT体积生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: PRDiT introduces a two-stage architecture with local MLP denoiser and global residual diffusion transformer for scalable, high-quality 3D medical volume synthesis, achieving detailed structures and efficient computation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对高分辨率三维CT体积生成中计算量大、细节难以建模的挑战，本文提出像素级残差扩散Transformer（PRDiT）。PRDiT采用两阶段训练：先用基于MLP的局部盲估计器在重叠补丁上去除低频结构，再用内存高效注意力的全局残差扩散Transformer精炼高频残差。实验证明，PRDiT能生成高质量的三维医学体积，在多种解剖结构上细节丰富且计算可控，为三维医学图像生成提供了可扩展的框架。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对高分辨率三维CT体积生成中计算量大、细节难以建模的挑战，本文提出像素级残差扩散Transformer（PRDiT）。PRDiT采用两阶段训练：先用基于MLP的局部盲估计器在重叠补丁上去除低频结构，再用内存高效注意力的全局残差扩散Transformer精炼高频残差。实验证明，PRDiT能生成高质量的三维医学体积，在多种解剖结构上细节丰富且计算可控，为三维医学图像生成提供了可扩展的框架。

deep_dive.title: SSD: Spatially Speculative Decoding Accelerates Autoregressive Image Generation
deep_dive.abstract: Autoregressive models excel in visual generation by treating images as 1D sequences of discrete tokens, mirroring language modeling. However, this flattening discards the intrinsic 2D spatial locality of visual signals, creating severe computational bottlenecks during inference. We introduce Spatially Speculative Decoding (SSD), a framework that aligns the predictive objective with the natural geometry of images. Rather than predicting only the immediate next token in a 1D sequence, our model simultaneously predicts the adjacent horizontal token and the token directly below it. By capitalizing on this 2D spatial correlation, spatially speculative decoding overcomes the memory wall in visual inference. Our approach accelerates autoregressive image generation by up to 13.3x while maintaining high fidelity on DPG-Bench and GenEval. Our results suggest that respecting the underlying geometry of vision unlocks massive computational efficiencies, paving the way for real-time, high-resolution autoregressive generative models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Accelerating autoregressive image generation via 2D speculative decoding
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过2D投机解码加速自回归图像生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过2D投机解码加速自回归图像生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过2D投机解码加速自回归图像生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SSD introduces spatially speculative decoding that predicts multiple tokens in 2D to accelerate autoregressive image generation, overcoming the memory wall by exploiting spatial locality.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 自回归图像生成将图像扁平化为1D序列，忽略了空间局部性导致推理瓶颈。本文提出空间投机解码（SSD），同时预测水平和垂直方向的相邻token，利用2D空间相关性突破内存墙，实现了显著的推理加速，为高效视觉生成提供了新方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 自回归图像生成将图像扁平化为1D序列，忽略了空间局部性导致推理瓶颈。本文提出空间投机解码（SSD），同时预测水平和垂直方向的相邻token，利用2D空间相关性突破内存墙，实现了显著的推理加速，为高效视觉生成提供了新方案。

deep_dive.title: Thinking in Boxes: 3D Editing in Real Images Made Easy
deep_dive.abstract: Text and 2D-conditioning interfaces provide weak, ambiguous control over spatial transformations in image editing -- particularly under large object motions and camera changes. Prior work has used 3D primitives such as boxes, but only as loose conditioning signals indicating approximate object location rather than specifying the transformation. We instead use 3D boxes as structured specifications: the user provides the input and output boxes of the edit, casting editing as a well-posed geometry problem. This ``thinking in boxes'' interface, where each box face is color-coded to convey 3D orientation, gives precise control over translation, rotation, scaling, and viewpoint changes in real images while preserving scene and object identity, and recovering previously unseen object regions. To ground transformations in scene appearance, we introduce a depth-aligned planar floor as a global reference frame, shaded with depth-aware cues. Conditioned on this structure, an image generator produces consistent results under large transformations. Trained in two stages -- on synthetic multi-object scenes and a small set of real-world videos from Objectron -- the system generalizes to complex, in-the-wild real images. Our method operates directly on real photographs and substantially outperforms recent state-of-the-art methods on large 3D edits.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Uses 3D boxes as structured specifications for precise spatial transformations in image editing
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用3D框作为结构化规范实现图像精确空间变换编辑
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用3D框作为结构化规范实现图像精确空间变换编辑
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用3D框作为结构化规范实现图像精确空间变换编辑
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a 3D-box-based interface for image editing that enables precise control over translation, rotation, scaling, and viewpoint changes while preserving identity.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对文本和二维条件在图像编辑中空间控制模糊的问题，提出基于三维框的结构化编辑界面，将编辑视为几何问题，用户提供输入输出框，实现位移、旋转、缩放和视角变换的精确控制，保持场景和物体身份，解决了大物体运动和相机变化下的编辑难题。实验表明该方法能实现以往方法未曾看见的精确三维编辑效果。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对文本和二维条件在图像编辑中空间控制模糊的问题，提出基于三维框的结构化编辑界面，将编辑视为几何问题，用户提供输入输出框，实现位移、旋转、缩放和视角变换的精确控制，保持场景和物体身份，解决了大物体运动和相机变化下的编辑难题。实验表明该方法能实现以往方法未曾看见的精确三维编辑效果。

quick_skim.title: Residual-Space Evolutionary Optimization via Flow-based Generative Models
quick_skim.abstract: Data editing with generative methods typically requires differentiable objectives and gradient-based search. However, these assumptions break down in flow-based settings, where edits are performed through forward and backward integration and often involve non-differentiable or black-box objectives. We introduce residual-space evolutionary optimization, a model-agnostic framework that addresses this gap by combining flow-based generative editing with evolutionary algorithms. Building on the observation that conditional flow matching (CFM) can disentangle condition-controlled factors from instance-specific residuals, our framework directly operates in residual space and separates two complementary search regimes: self-pollination performs local exploitation through feature-preserving residual refinement, and cross-pollination promotes broader exploration by recombining residuals across heterogeneous samples. As a proof of concept, we validate on MorphoMNIST, a benchmark dataset for counterfactual generation, and on crystal data, demonstrating that this exploration--exploitation decomposition provides a useful mechanism for balancing target alignment, instance preservation, and diversity, and extends beyond images to real-world scientific domains.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Proposes evolutionary optimization for flow-based generative editing, applicable to complex image editing tasks.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出基于流的生成编辑的进化优化方法，适用于复杂图像编辑任务。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出基于流的生成编辑的进化优化方法，适用于复杂图像编辑任务。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出基于流的生成编辑的进化优化方法，适用于复杂图像编辑任务。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Combines flow-based generative models with evolutionary algorithms in residual space for non-differentiable editing, enabling local and global exploration.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对流式生成模型编辑中不可微目标优化难题，提出残差空间进化优化框架，结合自交和交叉探索模式，实现局部与全局搜索。该方法扩展了生成编辑在复杂约束下的可行性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对流式生成模型编辑中不可微目标优化难题，提出残差空间进化优化框架，结合自交和交叉探索模式，实现局部与全局搜索。该方法扩展了生成编辑在复杂约束下的可行性。

quick_skim.title: On the Redundancy of Timestep Embeddings in Diffusion Models
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion models rely heavily on explicit timestep embeddings to modulate the denoising process across various noise scales. In this work, we challenge the necessity of these temporal signals by analyzing their impact on U-Net and Diffusion Transformer architectures. Beyond empirical evidence, we provide a theoretical framework demonstrating that, under certain conditions, the global minimizer of the diffusion training objective can be achieved without explicit timestep conditioning. Our findings reveal a surprising robustness when timestep embeddings are completely removed. Extensive ablation studies on the CelebA and CIFAR-10 datasets show that these time-agnostic models can maintain high structural fidelity and even surpass their conditioned counterparts in competitive metrics, including FID, precision, and recall. Our analysis suggests these architectures can implicitly infer noise scales from the corrupted input under specific assumptions, rendering explicit temporal conditioning redundant. This study challenges long-standing temporal conditioning paradigms and paves the way for more efficient and structurally focused generative architectures.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Demonstrates that diffusion models can be trained without explicit timestep embeddings, maintaining or improving performance
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 证明扩散模型无需显式时间步嵌入即可训练，并保持或提升性能
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 证明扩散模型无需显式时间步嵌入即可训练，并保持或提升性能
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 证明扩散模型无需显式时间步嵌入即可训练，并保持或提升性能
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Shows that removing timestep embeddings from diffusion models is possible without loss, with theoretical and empirical support on image datasets.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 对扩散模型中时间步嵌入的必要性提出挑战，通过理论和实证分析表明，在一定条件下，无时间步条件的模型可以达到全局最优，完全移除嵌入后仍保持结构保真度，甚至在CelebA和CIFAR-10上超越有条件模型，揭示了时间信号的冗余性，简化了扩散模型设计。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 对扩散模型中时间步嵌入的必要性提出挑战，通过理论和实证分析表明，在一定条件下，无时间步条件的模型可以达到全局最优，完全移除嵌入后仍保持结构保真度，甚至在CelebA和CIFAR-10上超越有条件模型，揭示了时间信号的冗余性，简化了扩散模型设计。
